name: Customer Feedback Intake
description: A single intake queue for feature requests, bug reports, and praise from support tickets, sales calls, and in-app widgets — themed, prioritized, and closing the loop when shipped.

teams.name: Customer Success
teams.description: Triages incoming feedback and closes the loop with customers when items ship.

workflowStates.name: New
workflowStates.description: Just came in — not yet reviewed.

workflowStates.name: Reviewing
workflowStates.description: Being evaluated for themes and impact.

workflowStates.name: Planned
workflowStates.description: Accepted and linked to a roadmap item.

workflowStates.name: In Progress
workflowStates.description: The linked roadmap item is being built.

workflowStates.name: Shipped
workflowStates.description: Live — time to close the loop with the requester.

workflowStates.name: Declined
workflowStates.description: Not planned, with a reason recorded for future reference.

labels.name: nps-detractor
labels.description: Sourced from a detractor NPS response.

issueTemplates.title: [Feedback] Wants bulk CSV import for existing customers migrating off spreadsheets
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Sales call, Acme Corp (enterprise, $42k ARR)

**Quote:** "We have 4,000 rows in a spreadsheet — if we can't import them on day one, we're not switching."

issueTemplates.title: [Feedback] Would love a dark mode
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** In-app feedback widget (12 upvotes)

Recurring request — check the feature-request tag for volume.

issueTemplates.title: [Bug] Notification emails arrive in the wrong timezone
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Support ticket #4821

Reminder emails show UTC instead of the workspace's configured timezone.

issueTemplates.title: [Praise] "This is the first tool my whole team actually uses"
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** NPS survey, score 10

Great quote for the testimonials page — get permission to use it.

issueTemplates.title: [Feedback] Needs SAML SSO before renewal
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Renewal call, Globex Inc (enterprise)

Blocking a $60k renewal. Linked to the SSO roadmap item.

issueTemplates.title: [Feedback] Mobile app crashes on opening large attachments
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** App Store review, 1 star

Affects Android only so far, 6 reports this week.

issueTemplates.title: [Feedback] Wants a public status page
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Multiple support tickets during last incident

Customers want to self-serve "is it just me" during outages.

views.name: Intake Queue
views.description: Everything new, oldest first — the daily triage list.

views.name: By Theme
views.description: Board grouped by label to spot recurring themes at a glance.

views.name: Roadmap Impact
views.description: Planned/In Progress/Shipped items with a count of linked feedback per row.
